preview_text:
The model favors Germany at 60%, with Ivory Coast positioned as a substantial underdog at 13%. Germany's baseline win probability reflects a meaningful advantage in the forecast, though the margin leaves room for an upset.

The 27% draw probability suggests the match has a competitive character. The spread across outcomes—60% favorite, 27% stalemate, 13% underdog—indicates a moderately decisive forecast rather than a tightly bunched outcome. Draws remain plausible but less likely than a German victory.

The model and sportsbook consensus are closely aligned. Both place Germany near 61%, and both assess Ivory Coast in the low-to-mid teens. The model estimates draw probability about 5 percentage points higher than the books. Polymarket prices sit between the two, with a slightly elevated Ivory Coast win probability. These small gaps suggest broad agreement on the fundamental match dynamics.
